## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related issues

Link any related issues here.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and any manual checks you performed.

```text
bun run format:check
bun run check
bun run test:coverage
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and matches the project scope.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] Generated Worker types were refreshed if Wrangler bindings changed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private account data were committed.
